name: JTEKT India Limited
summary: JTEKT India Limited manufactures and sells steering systems and other auto components for the passenger car and utility vehicle manufacturers in the automobile sector in India and internationally. The company offers steering gears, columns and RPS assemblies, axle assemblies, and other auto ancillaries. It also exports its products to the United States, Europe, and Japan. The company was formerly known as Sona Koyo Steering Systems Limited and changed its name to JTEKT India Limited in April 2018. The company was founded in 1984 and is headquartered in Gurugram, India. JTEKT India Limited is a subsidiary of JTEKT Corporation.
